# Planner Decisions — Automotive Relay Line

*Generated by `planning/planner.py` from customer requirements.*

## Inputs

| Input | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Product | Automotive Relay |
| Daily output | 400/day |
| Automation | full |
| Floor area | 120 m² |
| Workers | 3 |
| Quality | optical |
| Regulated | False |
| Budget | medium |

## Decisions

| Decision | Result | Rule | Rationale |
|----------|--------|------|-----------|
| Automation tier | full | automation_level.level (normalized) | Declared automation is 'full'; 133 units/worker/day → tier drives which automated stations are viable. |
| Parallel assembly | 1 | single station meets takt | One assembly station (cap ≈ 480/shift) covers 400/day. |
| Robot handling cell | YES | automation ≥ full OR daily_output ≥ 500; budget ≥ medium; area ≥ 120 m² | High automation / throughput justifies a robot; budget and 120 m² floor allow it. |
| Vision inspection | YES | quality mentions ['optical', 'vision', 'camera', 'high'] OR regulated; budget ≥ low | Quality/regulatory needs objective optical inspection → include vision. |
| Functional test | NO | quality mentions ['functional', 'electrical', 'test', 'flow'] OR regulated; budget ≥ low | No functional-test / regulatory requirement → skip functional test. |
| Compact layout | YES | area ≤ 150 m² | Small 120 m² floor → compact spacing. |
| Floor-area feasibility | 39.0 | sum(station area) ≤ available area | Stations need ≈ 39 m²; available 120 m². |

## Resulting line (6 stations, compact layout)

- **S01** — Loading Station
- **S02** — Assisted Assembly Station
- **S03** — Robot Handling Cell
- **S04** — Vision Inspection Station
- **S05** — Packaging Station
- **S06** — Finished Goods Storage

Flow: S01 → S02 → S03 → S04 → S05 → S06  (+X)
